title: Modules, Resolution, Packages, and Declaration Files
description: Publish a small typed library whose runtime exports, package metadata, and declaration surface agree in clean consumers. Learners cumulatively produce a consumable ESM package with declaration evidence through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Choose bundler or NodeNext resolution and trace file, extension, package exports, and type lookup decisions.
Distinguish type-only and value imports and preserve runtime side effects intentionally.
Align package exports, imports, type, declaration paths, runtime format, and supported environments.
